stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit · Home Run
notableEvents.detail: Tyler O'Neill homers (4) on a fly ball to left field.

notableEvents.label: Tristan Peters pinch-hit · Groundout
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters grounds out to first baseman Romy Gonzalez.

notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann pops out to shortstop Ryan Kreidler.

notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman grounds out, second baseman Tommy Edman to first baseman Freddie Freeman.

notableEvents.detail: Jake Rogers homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Zach McKinstry scores.
